title: oreogrammitis nuda
intro: Oreogrammitis nuda, also known as the naked spleenwort, is a species of fern native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and fever. The plant is rich in flavonoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, providing various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Oreogrammitis nuda is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal remedies, such as poultices or tinctures, for external applications.
